name: Strawberry Dessert Crapes
recipeInstructions:
Filling
2 Pints Strawberries - Sliced
1/2 Cup Light Brown Sugar
2 Cups Sour Cream or Whipped Cream
Powdered Sugar
Strawberries - Whole
Crepes:
1. In a bowl, beat eggs well with fork.
2. Add flour and salt, beating until smooth. Gradually beat in milk and 2 tablespoons water, and continue beating until smooth. Refrigerate, covered, for at least 30 minutes before using.
3. To cook crepes, slowly heat an 8-inch skillet with sloping sides until a drop of water sizzles and rolls off the surface.
4. For each crepe, brush pan lightly with butter. Pour in about one-third cup batter, rotating pan quickly to spread batter evenly over the bottom.
5. Cook until lightly browned on the bottom for approximately 30 seconds. Turn and brown lightly on the other side. Carefully turn out onto a serving plate and keep warm in an oven.
6. Fill each crepe with half a cup of sliced strawberries. Top with three tablespoons of sour cream. Fold over the crepe. Sprinkle with powdered sugar. Garnish with additional sour cream and strawberries. Serve immediately.
